---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: allAboutJS
---

## Use Case

Describe the problem or limitation you are running into. What are you trying to do that you currently cannot?

## Proposed Solution

What would you like to be able to do? Be as specific as you can — include example syntax, API shape, or configuration if relevant.

```js
// Example of what the feature might look like
```

## Alternatives Considered

Have you found any workarounds? Are there other approaches that could solve the same problem?

## Additional Context

Anything else that would help evaluate this request — related issues, prior art in other template engines, constraints or requirements specific to your use case.

---

> **Note:** Feature requests are evaluated against Mutor.js's design constraints (zero runtime dependencies, bounded template language, no global state, security-first architecture). Please read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) before submitting.
